_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: would be expected to influence trading in our SBSX‑listed securities
M&A context (MNPI): bidder Merriweather Capital Partners has delivered a draft Scheme Implementation Deed to acquire 100% for A$63.5m cash at A$0.84 per share; signing targeted 20 July 2026.
Draft IR line (not for release before embargo): “operations have normalised, no customer data affected, and we remain on track to deliver FY26 guidance.”

Governance: report to the Commonwealth Markets Authority lodged within 72 hours under Privacy Act principles; customer notifications to be issued only if Commonwealth Information Commissioner guidance requires.
Deal checklist triggers: confirm insurability, vendor indemnity, confirm definitive agreement schedules, and update bidder of any notifiable incident per Project QUOKKA protocol.
